en: Ever heard of a liver-versary?
ko: 리버서리(liver-versary) 들어봤어? 이 분이 오늘 축하하는데.

en: Ah-may-in-row-ee, Floor, are celebrating tonight.
She met him and he took half her liver 18 years ago this week.
ko: 만나서 18년 전 이번 주에 간 절반을 가져갔대. 누구야?

en: Where's, where's, who's this? This is, hang on, we've got to find out more here.
Who's, who's having their liver-versary? Hi.
So, so you got, who got whose liver? You got her liver.
ko: 안녕하세요. 누가 누구 간을 받은 거예요?

en: And did you know each other before? Yes.
ko: 그녀의 간을 받았어. 전에 알던 사이야? 네.

en: You, it's not like one of the Saw films.
Ah, yes, I had her in a basement and I took out half her liver.
And then we just sort of got talking. So what, so how do you know each other?
What's the relationship? You were already married and you got half her liver.
ko: 안녕하세요. 누가 누구 간을 받은 거예요?

en: What, sorry? Four months.
You'd been married for four months and you went, ah, the thing is, though,
do you remember the in-sickness and in-health?
ko: 이미 결혼한 사이에서 간 절반을 받았어? 뭐라고?

en: Yeah, well, you fucking signed it, love. I want half your liver.
Four months, you should have had it annulled. Well, I don't know, I don't know what you do with a liver-versary.
I guess, I guess not drinking, yeah.
Has it regenerated fully, sir? Yeah, that's the incredible thing about livers.
They fucking regenerate. And what happened to the first one?
What, sorry? It's in the bin.
ko: 리버서리에 뭘 하는지 모르겠어. 안 마시겠지.

en: What, what? I meant what was wrong with it, not what...
Ah, where's your first liver? Go on, what?
ko: 간이 재생되는 게 놀라워. 원래 간은 어떻게 됐어?

en: You had a rare disease.
A rare disease. Fucking, I need half your liver.
Fucking hell, you poor man. Because most guys, how long have you been together?
Like, like, Christ, you can't have an affair.
A guy can't take out a girl from the office for a drink, can he?
A fucker can't even have a drink. What, sorry?
It's all good. Yeah, you've sort of got to say that though, haven't you?
I feel bad for her as well, she can't leave. Look at the sunk cost.
I gave you the best years of my life and my fucking liver.
Fucking, what an amazing fucking thing to do, though. That's interesting. Amazing.
Haven't you got kids who could give their liver? I've got kids who could give their liver.
No, but the kid, the only reason I had kids was for hair transplants.
The technology's not there yet, but one day soon.
